description: Spending effort optimizing code that the profiler shows is a negligible fraction of runtime, yielding no measurable gain.
body: Failure mode: a function that looks inefficient is rewritten for speed, but it accounts for a tiny share of total time, so end-to-end performance is unchanged while complexity rises. Detection signals: post-change profile shows the same total time; the targeted frame was already <1% of the profile; benchmarks show no delta beyond noise. Do not optimize by intuition before profiling. Safer fallback: capture a representative profile, optimize the dominant frame, estimate the Amdahl ceiling first, and verify the share dropped after the change.
